name: Spotify
description: Access public song data via the Spotify API

endpoints.label: Add Song to Queue Player

fields.label: Track ID
fields.description: Enter a track URI or ID

endpoints.description: Add a song to your queue

endpoints.label: Currently Playing Player
endpoints.description: Get your currently playing track

endpoints.description: Skip to your next track

endpoints.description: Pause your music

endpoints.description: Skip to your previous song

endpoints.label: Recently Played Player

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

endpoints.description: Get your recently played tracks

endpoints.label: Resume Player
endpoints.description: Resume playback on the current active device

fields.description: The volume percentage to set
